merged_events.event_description: The United States established diplomatic relations with Timor-Leste and opened an Embassy in Dili on the date of formal independence, initially under Chargé d'Affaires Shari Villarossa.

evidence.quote: The United States and Timor-Leste (East Timor) established diplomatic relations on May 20, 2002, when the United States opened an Embassy in Dili.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both record the establishment of diplomatic relations and opening of the Embassy in Dili on 2002-05-20, the date of Timor-Leste's formal independence. High-confidence RDCR source with verified citation.
